heading_content_part: What kind of information is collected? For purposes of this Privacy Policy, “
personal data” means personally identifiable information that specifically identifies a user as an individual. “

Non-personal data” means information that does not directly identify a user. Additionally, non-personal data means “aggregate” and “de-personalized” information from which any personally identifiable data has been removed.
The App does not collect any personal data. However, Advertising companies may collect completely anonymous data (Non-personal data) through our service for solely ad targeting.
Photo Lib: We use this permission to store and retrieve images derived from the app. This permission does not give us access to your photos or videos.
